message:
Bring Übersicht widget closer to dashboard feature parity (#101)

Widget now shows: governor gauge + mode, budget bar, CLI chips with
pin indicator, model chips, last/next run times, restart count with
color warnings, scanner issue→PR pairs, reviewer coverage bar + health
dots, outreach growth/adoption metrics, architect PR counts, and repo
issue/PR summary. Width increased from 280→340px to fit new content.

Still read-only (no interactive controls) — those require the full
dashboard.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
